message.body: Tagherion subscribed with Prime. They've subscribed for 93 months! gzaYo

all your files are encrypted now

theres a symbol next to it in case there is one, and it changes in case you got it too
i think you could raise the game volume a bit btw
Geezer streaming fangams? what the skibidi???
how dare them add the option to fullscreen
this is a Long John specialty
I miss Long John Silvers. They closed down the one by me and the next nearest one is like 3 hours away

this is leeked content of cn1.67

is this how you really feel...
it saves your progress if you backspace
need to get some more mileage in IWM Kappa
would you rather be unwashed?? idk....
i would be up there for sure too

scholars have been debating that for years
You're not gonna read the reviews of the previous one?
not everyone cares to read every single review bro
pikmin is a stone cold killer
@IeveIing hey i can assure you resolved multiple impossible jumps
i hate when impossible jumps appear in my 60 difficulty needle screens
pikmin is strong.. but not immortal cmon
cool boss now that it works
you can actually talk to this npc
shooting does not destroy your bubble
i see weird camera issues and instantly know who made it fr
imagine making a boshy reference in 2026
i somehow got here from not boshy
so we all super old geezers :(
yea but were talking about the cultural impact of boshy
think of how many of us would be k3 kids instead...
where would we be without kill the guy or nang...
i feel like the answer to that is to just look at branches of the community that aren't heavily influenced from boshy
imagine if gate jump was never made....
@Skulldude_ we'd never have diverse, and then we'd never have diverse all bosses youtube video
and think about how different the world would be without that
granted i think ktg cuts from similar cloth as boshy, but i'd say ktg is way more popular with the spanish community than boshy is
omg did you see the newest happil update!!!!!
in defense of K3 it has gotten an update more recently than older players internalize
these kids dont remember the huge hype when parallel world dropped...
ok to be fair i don't think i remember that
back in my days boshy was the hype game
they weren't there when vardoc was streaming ktg and everyone was hanging out in the online lobby and the arena
it's true, I wasnt there for that
I only got here in mid 2013
there's kids on this site that were born in 2013....
arzztt games made me tolerate it a lot more
@legrandgrand that hurts me more than you know
13 year olds living in a world where k3 has always existed
down arrow reflipped you without the noise
only 7 more for the elite stages!
we ddint have the budget for an inspect sprite for the badges
you'll have to restart the stage for the secret
you pressed continue so I guess it goes back to the last save?
the secret is like halfway through
secret is on this screen btw
middle age starts at 28 sorry bros
it saves once you collect it, yes
tbh 28 * 3 = 84... that's pretty darn old. I guess middle age starts more like 25-26
Games production value is far too high
im sure someone has done it
it might be more impressive than the xynchrome clear if you do it
I think I understand why this game was considered outside the scope of the game
I'm impressed the music hasn't looped yet
and now to go back, cya uin 5 minutes
i made this game on my calculator back in high school
i did make a maze game kinda like this where you were just a dot moving through a maze for the calculator. ti 82 or something
the beginning of the end for you, making that first calculator game, hehe
i think if you had a ti 83 you could play doom
it wouldn"t be the true barbuta experience
yeah UFO50 first game is called Barbuta
its raining so fucking much rn
im shocked i still have power on lol
I'm honestly mesmerized by the mind that made whatever this is
walking around talking to mushrooms in a giant heart beyond the forest
oh shit I didn't see the heart
purple = moira, blue = pharah, orange = tracer, green = lucio
is there anything left to explore?
everyone played it, not everyone beat it
green dot is clearly a bontanist and structural engineer
damn geezer I remember when I watched you like a decade ago or something, glad to know you're still doing this <3
